title: Virtuoso 7.0.0. doesn't implement SPARQL 1.1 COALESCE properly
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, value FLOAT);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (1, NULL), (2, 2.0), (3, NULL);
SELECT COALESCE(value, 1.0/0) AS result FROM test_table WHERE id = 2;
SELECT COALESCE(1.0/0, value) AS result FROM test_table WHERE id = 2;
SELECT COALESCE(NULL, value, 1.0/0) AS result FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: Improper handling of COALESCE with division by zero
